Restriction: Permission of instructor.

COMM715 Advanced Qualitative Methods in Communication Research (3 Credits)

Advanced data analysis of qualitative data in Communication research. In-field research and techniques for analysis of data from in-field work.

COMM718 Practicum in Research Proposal and Design (3 Credits) Development of research proposal through research team interaction. In different semester the course focuses on different subdisciplines of communication.
